text:
Republic of Hass (, Hasu Kyōwakoku) is one of the nations of the Mitene Union. It is bordered by the Republic of Rokario on the west and the Republic of West Gorteau at the east.

Background

After the Chimera Ant crisis was over this country took over part of the Republic of East Gorteau with other parts being taken over by the Republic of Rokario and the Republic of West Gorteau. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 30, Chapter 318 

Translations around the World
